instruction: What were the causes and consequences of the fall of the Roman Empire? The response must contain exactly five sentences. The response must contain at least 200 words, with each sentence containing at most 20 words.

The Roman Empire faced many complex problems.
Economic decay and heavy taxes hurt people.
Barbarian invasions caused massive territorial losses.
Political instability weakened the central government.
The empire eventually collapsed into many states.
